name: GPT-5.6 Luna
archDisplay: Undisclosed architecture (presumed dense transformer); fastest/cheapest 'durable capability tier' of the GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna family, built for cost-sensitive high-volume workloads
note: Cheapest/fastest tier of the three-tier GPT-5.6 family (GA July 9, 2026 alongside Sol and Terra); OpenAI positions the tiers as 'durable capability tiers that can advance on their own cadence' — Luna targets cost-sensitive, high-volume workloads. Same 1.05M context, 128K max output and Feb 2026 knowledge cutoff as Sol, at a fifth of Sol's price ($1/$6 vs $5/$30 per MTok). Distinct model tier, not a reasoning-effort configuration of Sol (each tier separately exposes its own effort settings).

results.notes: SWE-Bench Pro, GPT-5.6 Luna, OpenAI launch comparison table (Sol 64.6 / Terra 63.4 / Luna 62.7); per kingy.ai's launch-table digest (kingy.ai/blog/gpt-5-6-sol-terra-luna-benchmarks-specs), corroborated by BenchLM's Luna tracker (62.7%).

Terminal-Bench 2.1, GPT-5.6 Luna standard configuration, OpenAI launch table; per kingy.ai's launch-table digest (kingy.ai/blog/gpt-5-6-sol-terra-luna-benchmarks-specs), corroborated by BenchLM (84.7%). BenchLM separately lists an independent 'TerminalBench 2.1' run of 80.9% for Luna.
BrowseComp, GPT-5.6 Luna, OpenAI launch table; per kingy.ai's launch-table digest (kingy.ai/blog/gpt-5-6-sol-terra-luna-benchmarks-specs), corroborated by BenchLM (83.3%).
Agents' Last Exam, GPT-5.6 Luna, OpenAI launch table (Sol 52.7 / Terra 50.4 / Luna 50.3); per kingy.ai's launch-table digest (kingy.ai/blog/gpt-5-6-sol-terra-luna-benchmarks-specs).
FrontierMath Tier 1-3 v2, GPT-5.6 Luna, OpenAI launch table; per kingy.ai's launch-table digest (kingy.ai/blog/gpt-5-6-sol-terra-luna-benchmarks-specs), corroborated by BenchLM (78.6%).
FrontierMath Tier 4 v2, GPT-5.6 Luna, OpenAI launch table; per kingy.ai's launch-table digest (kingy.ai/blog/gpt-5-6-sol-terra-luna-benchmarks-specs), corroborated by BenchLM (58.5%).
GPQA Diamond, GPT-5.6 Luna, BenchLM tracker snapshot. Same BenchLM provenance as the Sol tier's 94.6% row.

GDPval-AA v2 (Elo) for GPT-5.6 Luna = 1591.8, from MarkTechPost's direct report of the GPT-5.6 launch comparison table — the same source and table as the Sol tier's 1747.8 row, which explicitly lists Terra 1593 and Luna 1591.8. BenchLM's later live snapshot reads 1584 (leaderboard refits); the launch-table figure is kept for cross-tier consistency. GDPval-AA is Artificial Analysis's own independent methodology, hence 'independent'.
CyberGym, GPT-5.6 Luna = 77.9%, BenchLM tracker snapshot — same third-party leaderboard provenance as the Sol tier's 84.5% row.
MMMU-Pro, GPT-5.6 Luna, BenchLM tracker snapshot (79.5% with Python tool).
τ³-Banking (Artificial Analysis methodology), GPT-5.6 Luna = 27.2%, BenchLM tracker snapshot.

FrontierBench v0.1 (74 tasks, 7 domains), Codex harness, max effort: resolution rate 14.3% ±1.2%, rank 7 of 8 on the official leaderboard; 12.0B tokens, ~$1.7k run cost. Run by the FrontierBench team (Terminal-Bench/Harbor maintainers). Statistically tied with Sonnet 5's 14.6% ±1.5% at under a quarter of the cost.

verificationNotes:
Existence, tier positioning, $1/$6 pricing, 1.05M context, 128K max output, Feb 16 2026 knowledge cutoff, and text+vision(input) modalities all confirmed directly from OpenAI's official model docs page (developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5.6-luna, fetched 2026-07-24); pricing independently corroborated by finout.io, eesel.ai and aipricing.guru tier-pricing explainers. Added to the corpus as part of the GPT-5.6 tier split; the sibling flagship Sol tier was already tracked (formerly under the bare gpt-5-6 slug).

2026-07-24 TIER SPLIT / FULL INGESTION: promoted to a full sibling model of Sol and Terra (config flags true/true — three distinct capability-tier models like Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku, not an effort cohort). Ingested 11 further benchmark rows: six self-reported from OpenAI's launch comparison table (via kingy.ai's digest, cross-corroborated by BenchLM's independent tracker where available — every overlapping value matched exactly) and five independent (BenchLM tracker snapshots plus the MarkTechPost-reported GDPval-AA launch table). Unlike Sol and Terra, BenchLM's Luna tracker publishes NO Humanity's Last Exam or IFBench figure — both omitted rather than estimated. Deliberately not mapped for lack of a taxonomy slug: OSWorld 2.0 (45.6%), ARC-AGI-3 (0.2%), DeepSWE (67.2%), Toolathlon (53.4%), Terminal-Bench Hard, FrontierCode/CursorBench/SciCode/CritPt/HealthBench/Omniscience/ExploitBench/ExploitGym, BenchCAD, MRCR/GraphWalks (Luna's 41.3% MRCR figures), and all AA composite indices.

2026-07-24 FRONTIERBENCH: ingested the FrontierBench v0.1 leaderboard row (see the result's own notes for harness, effort, CI, tokens and cost).
